title: Could Kaworu Rei and Shinji be siblings
display_title: Could Kaworu Rei and Shinji be siblings
wikitext:
[]: Could Kaworu, Rei, and Shinji be siblings?             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Feb 15, 2010 5:05 pm before you bite my head off, this is a what if? im just having a little fun. okay, heres my point. yui was pregnant shortly before 2I, but we don't know how long before. we also know Shinji was born in 2001, and Rei is the same age, but we don't know the exact dates of their births. heres the clincher, what if gendo used yui to create kaworu in an attampt to create a beign like an F.A.R. now mabey SEELE seized him, explaining more why gendo hated them. now mabey he impregnated yui again in a second experiment. annd mabey she had fraternal twins one being Shinji a human, the other Rei who would be an F.A.R., and mabey Rei died in the womb. this failure gendo would immediately blame on Shinji, but yui being a loving mother, wouldn't let gendo get rid of him. this would explain gendos mild contempt for Shinji. now he could have taken the remains of the Rei fetus and cloned her so he would have his F.A.R. child, but he might have wanted to keep it secret from yui as not to shock her. yui dies, gendo gets rid of Shinji and brings Rei into the picture, accelerate 11 years and bam, we have our story. the best thing is that the hole in the cannon is big enough to allow this back story. so, what do you think of this what if? im going to write a fan fic entitled "yui's memoirs" that goes to the effect of something like this. can't do it till the summer though.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 15, 2010 5:10 pm At a genetic level, it's possible. It's still just out there as to who was the genetic donor for Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Feb 15, 2010 5:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: At a genetic level, it's possible. It's still just out there as to who was the genetic donor for Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 15, 2010 5:21 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: the same for Shinji and Rei, it was gendo,

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Feb 15, 2010 5:30 pm Prior to me joining here, I remember that there was a fanwank being tossed around that Kaworou was the production of a similar kind of extraction process concerning whoever was in Unit 00 (Naoko Akagi?) and Adam. Or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 15, 2010 5:37 pm ran1 wrote: Kaworou was the production of a similar kind of extraction process concerning whoever was in Unit 00 (Naoko Akagi?) and Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Feb 15, 2010 5:40 pm Shinji is the only one of the three who can be confirmed to have both Gendou and Yui's DNA. Rei is Lilith and Yui's child, if you want to think of it like that. Kaworu is obviously Adam's child, but the identity of the DNA donor for the Adam "contact experiment" still being uncertain (although Dr. Katsuragi and Gendou are the two prime suspects), we can't say for sure who his daddy is. But he wasn't produced as an aftereffect of salvage procedures on an Eva, as Rei apparently was; if he was born on the day of Second Impact, that implies he just spontaneously manifested, along with the mini-Adam body.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Feb 15, 2010 6:55 pm ran1 wrote: Prior to me joining here, I remember that there was a fanwank being tossed around that Kaworou was the production of a similar kind of extraction process concerning whoever was in Unit 00 (Naoko Akagi?) and Adam. Or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Feb 15, 2010 7:54 pm ObsessiveMathsFreaks wrote: This seems entirely possible if Kaworu is considered to have been created in a similar manner to Rei. The trouble this leads to is the nature of the original "pilot" or contact of of Adam in Antarctica. Only wild speculation yields answers on this one. We could as easily postulate Gendou as we could Chairman Keel, for the same quality of results

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 15, 2010 8:09 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I'm not inclined to put too much stock in Kaworu's birth date.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 16, 2010 12:11 am Random: ran1 wrote: Prior to me joining here, I remember that there was a fanwank being tossed around that Kaworou was the production of a similar kind of extraction process concerning whoever was in Unit 00 (Naoko Akagi?) and Adam. Or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Feb 16, 2010 12:13 am I still stand by my idea that just as Rei is a genetic clone of Yui, Kaworu is to Gendo for epic symmetry and dualism.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 16, 2010 12:22 am AuraTwilight wrote: I still stand by my idea that just as Rei is a genetic clone of Yui, Kaworu is to Gendo for epic symmetry and dualism.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Feb 16, 2010 1:57 am Aura, if symmetry and dualism appeal to you, how about main character's (Shinji) mother, Yui, did Contact Experiment (2004) involving SOL (Lilith), result is pale, red-eyed Eva pilot (Rei), with Yui's looks and Lilith's soul; other main character's (Misato) father, Dr. Katsuragi, was involved with Contact Experiment (2000) with SOL (Adam), result is pale, red-eyed Eva pilot (Kaworu), with ?'s looks and Adam's soul. Such symmetry doesn't prove that Dr. Katsuragi was the donor for the "genes that dived into Adam", but it sure does make one wonder...

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Feb 16, 2010 2:39 am @Reichu Right, right Gendo did get out of that continent the day before the contact experiment, so I'll guess that he didn't really want to be Kaworu's daddy all that bad, if only from the problems that might have come from getting a child out of wedlock , he can still be a father inlaw though And like you said Tabby-kun's face just doesn't look much like Rokubungi's, they both are angular to some extent but that's where the similarities end. Tabby-kun's face does have more in common with the bloody handed scientist we all saw in second impact, Actualy Kaworu having a similar facial structure to Misato has come up in (seitenkan) discussions in the Japanese side of the fandom, It might be interesting if Nagisa's relation to Katsuragi was loosely analogous to that Ikari has with Aynanami, wouldn't that mean that the Katsuragi both have a thing for Puppy-kun? I guess given what's at hand I just have to agree with Shin-seiki, and whoever pushed the theory on Kaworu's donor I wonder who it could have been I really did like all of the extracanonical Akira stuff As far as Rei's relation with Shinji is concerned though she is something of a semi identical twin. They both have identical maternal genes, and their appearance draws of heavily from Yui as Gendo and Fuyutsuki have noted. The fact that the show tended to place parallels between the two probably (Rei if it's a girl Shinji if it's a boy) doesn't do much to discourage connections, or the twincest ideas. Metaphorically and appearance wise Shinji and Rei seem to mirror each other to an extent, where as Kaworu is more of a contrast with Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 16, 2010 7:22 am Kaworu and Shinji siblings? No. Rei and Shinji siblings? Since Rei is a clone of Yui that could be argued. Probably. Rei and Kaworu? Even though they both have angel DNA I wouldn't say they can be considered siblings.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Feb 16, 2010 9:35 am whee, your all ahving fun. nnow to add another spark, keep in mind they alll look closely the same, so there is a good possibility that they share 1 genetic trait in common. ha ha! oh, and synapsid, not even a hint of sexuality talk in this thread. i wannt this nice and clean please.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 16, 2010 9:38 am Rei and Shinji look similar due to Rei having Yui's face however Shinji doesn't look similar to Kaworu and besides Rei having red eyes and the same pale skin she doesn't look similar to Kaworu either.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Feb 16, 2010 9:58 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Rei and Shinji look similar due to Rei having Yui's face however Shinji doesn't look similar to Kaworu and besides Rei having red eyes and the same pale skin she doesn't look similar to Kaworu either.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 16, 2010 10:01 am supershinjiasukashipper wrote: kaworu looking like a slightly older Shinji
